final_prompt.prompt:
Design a logo using the provided letter "B" — a serif elegant style — with an eye symbol integrated in the center of the letter, similar to the reference logo provided.

Style/medium: elegant serif logo design, flat vector
Composition: letter "B" centered, eye motif placed in the middle/interior of the "B"
Subject: logo mark combining the letter "B" (serif, elegant) with an eye in its center
Scene/backdrop: transparent or white background
Lighting/mood:
Color palette:
Materials/textures: flat vector, clean lines
Text (verbatim): B
Constraints:
  use the provided letter "B" as the typographic base
  eye must be visually integrated inside the "B" shape, referencing the provided logo composition
Avoid: raster effects, drop shadows, decorative clutter unrelated to the "B" + eye concept
